# P-E-003 — Payment routed via a sanctioned jurisdiction

> Paiement vers une juridiction sanctionnée

## Description (EN)

Beneficiary bank account is located in a sanctioned jurisdiction (Iran, DPRK, Syria, …).

## Description (FR)

Compte bancaire de paiement situé dans une juridiction sous sanctions internationales (Iran, RPDC, Syrie…).

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Sanctioned-jurisdiction payment — payment routes through a country on the FATF black/grey list or a specifically sanctioned jurisdiction (Iran, North Korea, etc.).

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.40 + weight 0.85.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Legitimate-trade routing** via a tax-haven jurisdiction with disclosure.

## Production wiring

Requires the BEAC payment adapter to surface counterparty jurisdiction.
